policies.inbound:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("precheckEnabled", true))">
                
                
                
                
                    <when condition="@{
                        var label = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("incomingClassification", "").Trim();
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(label)) { return false; }
                        var blocked = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("blockedClassifications", "")
                            .Split(',').Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0);
                        return blocked.Any(b => string.Equals(b, label, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
                    }">
                        
                            
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            @{
                                return new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", "Blocked by data-classification pre-check."),
                                    new JProperty("correlationId", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlationId")),
                                    new JProperty("reasonCodes", new JArray("PRECHECK_CLASSIFICATION_BLOCKED")),
                                    new JProperty("classification", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("incomingClassification"))
                                ).ToString();
                            }
                        
                    
                
                
                
                
                    <when condition="@{
                        var ct = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Content-Type", "");
                        if (!(ct.Contains("json") || ct.Contains("text") || ct.Contains("x-www-form-urlencoded") || string.IsNullOrEmpty(ct))) { return false; }
                        var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true) ?? "";
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(body)) { return false; }
                        var pattern = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("precheckRegex", "");
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pattern)) { return false; }
                        try {
                            return System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.IsMatch(
                                body, pattern,
                                System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.IgnoreCase,
                                TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100));
                        } catch { return false; }
                    }">
                        
                            
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            @{
                                return new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("message", "Blocked by pattern pre-check."),
                                    new JProperty("correlationId", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlationId")),
                                    new JProperty("reasonCodes", new JArray("PRECHECK_PATTERN_BLOCKED"))
                                ).ToString();
                            }
                        
                    
                
            
        
        
        
        
            {{inspection-function-url}}
            POST
            
                {{inspection-function-key}}
            
            
                application/json
            
            @{
                return new JObject(
                    new JProperty("correlationId", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlationId")),
                    new JProperty("requestId", context.RequestId.ToString()),
                    new JProperty("user", new JObject(
                        new JProperty("id", context.User?.Id ?? ""),
                        new JProperty("upn", context.User?.Email ?? ""),
                        new JProperty("groups", new JArray(context.User?.Groups?.Select(g => g.Name) ?? new string[0])))),
                    new JProperty("source", new JObject(
                        new JProperty("application", context.Subscription?.Name ?? ""),
                        new JProperty("apimSubscriptionId", context.Subscription?.Id ?? ""),
                        new JProperty("operation", context.Operation?.Name ?? ""),
                        new JProperty("requestPath", context.Request.Url.Path),
                        new JProperty("model", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-model", "")))),
                    new JProperty("content", new JObject(
                        new JProperty("type", "prompt"),
                        new JProperty("text", context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true)),
                        new JProperty("blobUrl", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-blob-url", "")),
                        new JProperty("metadata", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("x-data-classification", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-data-classification", "")),
                            new JProperty("x-ms-sensitivity-label", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-sensitivity-label", "")),
                            new JProperty("x-purview-label-id", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-purview-label-id", "")),
                            new JProperty("qualifiedName", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-purview-qualified-name", "")),
                            new JProperty("purviewGuid", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-purview-guid", "")))))),
                    new JProperty("options", new JObject(
                        new JProperty("returnRedactedText", true),
                        new JProperty("lookupPurview", true),
                        new JProperty("lookupAtlas", true),
                        new JProperty("runContentSafety", true),
                        new JProperty("runPiiDetection", true)))
                ).ToString();
            }
        
        
        <set-variable name="decision" value="@{
            var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["inspection"];
            if (resp == null || resp.StatusCode >= 400) { return new JObject(new JProperty("action", "Review")); }
            return resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        }" />
        
        
        
            @($"correlationId={context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlationId")} action={context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("action")}")
        
        
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("action") == "Block")">
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var d = (JObject)context.Variables["decision"];
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Request blocked by data protection policy."),
                            new JProperty("correlationId", d["correlationId"]),
                            new JProperty("reasonCodes", d["reasonCodes"])
                        ).ToString();
                    }
                
            
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("action") == "Review")">
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var d = (JObject)context.Variables["decision"];
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Request requires manual review."),
                            new JProperty("correlationId", d["correlationId"]),
                            new JProperty("reasonCodes", d["reasonCodes"])
                        ).ToString();
                    }
                
            
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("action") == "Redact" && ((JObject)context.Variables["decision"])["redactedText"] != null && ((JObject)context.Variables["decision"])["redactedText"].Type != JTokenType.Null)">
                @(((JObject)context.Variables["decision"])["redactedText"].ToString())
            
            
        
        
        
            @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlationId"))
